title: Tier-pinned worker pools with task-return, not persistent inbox peers
context: Needed a coordination model for multi-agent execution.

options.name: inbox-peers
options.rationale: Long-lived agents react to each other in real time.
options.tradeoff: Carry growing context (token cost, context rot); you own deadlock detection and all plumbing.

options.name: tier-pinned-task-return
options.rationale: Ephemeral workers, fresh context per task, return a result.

reasoning: Isolation removes cross-agent deadlock/contradiction by construction; a fresh session per task is token hygiene for free; far less plumbing to maintain. Live peer reaction wasn't needed for the workload.
